title: WOKE KAREN TRIES TO BLOW UP ICE FACILITY & IS FACING 20 YEARS IN PRISON!
description:
The Quartering reacts to the federal arrest of Sarah Elizabeth George, a Boise woman facing decades in prison after allegedly stealing an ambulance and attempting to firebomb a DHS ICE facility in Idaho.

#TheQuartering #SarahElizabethGeorge #IdahoNews #CanyonCounty #DHS #TrueCrime #PoliticalCommentary #CultureWar #SocialMediaConsequences #FederalPrison
